summary: Frontend-only MES dashboard for Indonesian Precast Concrete Factory. Verified all 13 routes load without errors, sidebar with 13 nav items, sidebar collapse toggle, header components (plant, shift, search, notifications, help, settings, user dropdown with 4 menu items), Dashboard 12 KPI cards + 2 recharts charts, Master Data 12 tabs (switching works), Production Orders search filter narrows 10 rows to 1 for 'Barrier', Reports 6 tabs with 8 recharts surfaces, QC 4 tabs, Inventory 4 tabs. Zero console errors across all pages. UI matches SAP Fiori inspired light theme (blue/gray/white) with Bahasa Indonesia labels.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: data-testid naming for KPI cards could be more semantic. Out of 12 expected ids (kpi-target, kpi-realisasi, kpi-pencapaian, kpi-curing, kpi-siapqc, kpi-rejectrate, kpi-stok, kpi-material, kpi-utilisasi, kpi-wip, kpi-efisiensi, kpi-produkjadi) only 7 matched the guessed names but 12 kpi-* testids are present in DOM. Not a bug, just naming inconsistency that may affect future automation tests.
Minor typo in mockData.js: `worKInProgress` (irregular casing) on line 22 - should be `workInProgress`. Does not affect rendering as Dashboard reads it consistently.
Mock data only - no backend present, which aligns with frontend-only requirement.
seed_data_creation: None - app uses static mock data in /app/frontend/src/data/mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 routes (/, /master-data, /planning, /production-orders, /production-execution, /curing, /quality, /inventory, /sales, /delivery, /purchasing, /maintenance, /reports) load with zero console errors. Sidebar testids: sidebar-nav-{id}. Header testids: app-header, global-search, header-help, header-notifications, header-settings, header-user-menu, menu-profile, menu-preferences, menu-shift, menu-logout. PO page testids: po-search, po-status-filter, po-row-{i}. Charts render via recharts (svg.recharts-surface count > 0 on dashboard and reports). No retesting needed.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All listed features in review_request are working as expected.
